text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you on board!
Welcome to the community, @guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Can't wait to see what events you help organize!
Welcome to the community, @newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Feel free to explore and introduce yourself!
Welcome to the community, @mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. We're grateful for you sharing your knowledge with our members!
